summary: Post-refactoring regression test completed. Fixed 6 missing lucide-react icon imports across 5 page components (ChallengesPage, InfrastructurePage, MarketplacePage, Dashboard, CinemaJournal) and 1 missing Calendar component import (FilmWizard). All 18+ pages now render correctly after refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing lucide-react imports: History (ChallengesPage), ArrowUpCircle/Car/Building2/GraduationCap/ShoppingBag/Landmark (InfrastructurePage), ShoppingBag/Ticket (MarketplacePage), TrendingDown (Dashboard), MessageCircle (CinemaJournal)
Fixed missing Calendar component import in FilmWizard (Calendar as CalendarComponent from ui/calendar)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-refactoring regression test completed. All 27+ extracted page components from App.js are now rendering correctly. Key pages tested: Dashboard, Games, Challenges, Infrastructure, Marketplace, Social, Chat, Films, Create, Profile, Leaderboard, Notifications, Friends, Festivals, Sagas, Journal, Stars, Tutorial, Statistics, Password Recovery, Nickname Recovery. The hamburger menu is visible and functional. TopNavbar renders with user funds ($10.1M), level (Lv.0), and notifications. Login works with test1@test.com/Test1234!. No runtime errors or blank pages.
tests_passed: Dashboard loads with stats, financial overview, quick actions
Navigation to all main pages works
TopNavbar renders correctly with user info, balance, notifications
Page transitions work with AnimatePresence + PageTransition
bugs_fixed_during_testing: ChallengesPage.jsx - Added missing History icon import
InfrastructurePage.jsx - Added missing Car, Building2, GraduationCap, ArrowUpCircle, ShoppingBag, Landmark icon imports
MarketplacePage.jsx - Added missing ShoppingBag, Ticket icon imports
Dashboard.jsx - Added missing TrendingDown icon import
CinemaJournal.jsx - Added missing MessageCircle icon import
FilmWizard.jsx - Added missing Calendar component import (CalendarComponent)
